overall_justification: The edition primarily focuses on market reports concerning exchange rates and coffee prices, which are relevant to the context of the "Caixa de Conversão" debate but do not explicitly endorse either the Orthodox or Expansionist position. While the "O COMMERCIO E O CAMBIO" article discusses customs difficulties, it doesn't link them directly to the monetary debate.  No editorials or opinion pieces explicitly arguing for or against the "Caixa" were found.

supporting_evidence.quote: As taxas baixas do cambio provocaram a baixa de titulos, tendo por isso func-cionado receioso o mercado de cambio.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This quote from the 'O MERCADO' section reflects market concerns about exchange rate fluctuations, a key issue in the "Caixa" debate, but doesn't take a stance.

supporting_evidence.quote: Apezar das taxas baixas do cambio, tivemos o mercado aqui pouco activo, calmo no Centro e sem orientação segura na exportação.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: From the 'O CAFÉ' section, this acknowledges the low exchange rates and their impact on the coffee market, another key area related to the debate, but remains neutral in its assessment.
